summary: Backend-only validation completed for direct diagnostic→final_report transition behavior. Scoped transition tests pass; full repo test run still has unrelated pre-existing failures.

critical.issue: Final-report fallback path uses generic getSafeFallback(final_report) text without mandatory Final Report headers/labor breakdown/Total labor line. If upstream final report generation fails, strict output contract is violated.

minor.issue: Pivot transition test passes even when final report generation errors in test logs because assertions do not verify final report body content for pivot path.
Unrelated suite failures remain: Prisma client module resolution in retention/input-language tests (Cannot find module '.prisma/client/default').

action_items: Make final_report fallback response schema-compliant (required headers + labor task breakdown + 'Total labor: X hr').
Strengthen pivot-path test assertions to verify final report payload content and no labor-confirmation wording/events.
Fix Prisma test environment/generation so full suite can pass (retention/input-language files).
critical_code_review_comments: route.ts auto-transition logic correctly bypasses labor_confirmation and updates mode directly to final_report.
Transition constraints and final prompt correctly instruct: no labor confirmation questions and no follow-up questions.
Risk: final_report fallback in mode-validators.ts is not contract-compliant for strict Final Report output requirements.

success_rate.backend: Scoped: 100% (2/2 in chat-transition-final-report.test.ts); Full suite: failing due to unrelated pre-existing tests

context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated direct diagnostic→final_report transitions for transition-signal and context-engine-pivot flows. No labor_confirmation mode writes observed in scoped tests. Full repo `yarn test` still blocked by unrelated Prisma module issues in retention/input-language suites.
rca of the issue: RCA-1 (strict-output risk): In /src/lib/mode-validators.ts, getSafeFallback('final_report') returns generic non-report text. When final report generation fails in /api/chat transition path, route streams that fallback; output no longer guarantees mandatory headers/labor breakdown/total line. RCA-2 (test blind spot): In pivot test, mockFetch only supplies two responses; diagnostic retry can consume extra call, causing final report call error in logs, but assertions only check mode transition and absence of labor_confirmation write, not final report content.
